The stainless steel material of the forks ensures that it is sturdy enough to not bend easily, giving you long-term use.

【Ergonomic Design and Mirror Polished】The ergonomic handle design and the right weight ensure that you won't get tired after using this forks for a long time. In addition, these forks are mirror-polished with smooth edges and no unwanted burrs that won't scratch your mouth when you use them.

【Classic Design】The design of the dining forks is classic, which can perfectly fit a variety of dining table styles. The handle of the forks has a unique anti-slip design, so you no longer have to worry about the forks set slipping off when you enjoy your food.

【Multi-Use and Dishwasher Safe】The forks set are multifunctional no matter for daily use or storage for festivals and formal events, such as weddings, parties, celebrations, family dinners, picnics and BBQ. Meanwhile, the dinner forks set is also a great choice for restaurants, bistro, cafe, roadhouse and hotel. Besides, these forks are easy to clean and dishwasher safe.
